name: @awareness.market/setup
description: CLI tool to inject Awareness Memory workflow rules into IDE config files

scripts.ship-gate:L1: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),cp=require('child_process');const walk=(d,out=[])=>{for(const e of fs.readdirSync(d,{withFileTypes:true})){const p=d+'/'+e.name;e.isDirectory()?walk(p,out):/\.(m?js|cjs)$/.test(e.name)&&out.push(p)}return out};const files=walk('src');files.forEach(f=>cp.execSync('node -c '+f));console.log('L1 syntax OK ('+files.length+' files)')"
scripts.ship-gate:L3: echo 'L3 chaos: headless-auth timeout/5xx covered in tests/cli.test.cjs (headless-auth-* suites)'
scripts.ship-gate: npm run ship-gate:L1 && npm run ship-gate:L2 && npm run ship-gate:L3
